_setup: Get your API key at airtable.com/create/tokens → Create token → Scopes: data.records:read, data.records:write, schema.bases:read → Give access to the specific bases you want Claude to see
_examples: Show me all active clients from Airtable
Add a row to my content pipeline
Update the status of client X to 'Onboarding'
List all records in the Ad Campaigns table
